landing.subtitle: The difference between who you are and who you want to be.

phrase1.part1: The difference between who you are and who you want to be,

phrases.phrase2: Transform your physique. Transform your life.

phrases.phrase4: Physical discipline. Aesthetic optimization. Mental dominance.
phrases.phrase6: Your appearance is your first competitive advantage.

philosophy.legacy: In a hyper-competitive and appearance-driven world, your face and physique determine how people treat you, the opportunities you receive, and the level of life you live. This 12-week program is only for those ready to join the elite.
philosophy.text: True transformation doesn't happen only in the body. It happens in the mind, in discipline, and in how you face each day. Our system combines physical training, aesthetic optimization, advanced nutrition, and biohacking protocols to maximize your physique, presence, and mental performance.

results.title: Results
results.text: Maximize your inner and outer self. We understand the science behind optimizing your physique, appearance, and performance. We reduce your body fat percentage, improve your physical presence, and apply modern performance protocols so you project confidence, energy, and dominance. We only accept 50 clients per year. This program is not for everyone; it's for those ready to commit to their transformation. Build your best version.

coach.title: Your Coach
coach.name: Mateo Haces
coach.description: High-performance athlete, MMA fighter, and expert in peptides and nootropics for total ascension. Mateo has dedicated his life to understanding how to transform the human body through science, discipline, physical training, aesthetic optimization, and modern biohacking protocols.

hero.subtitle: The Weak Make Excuses. The Strong Make History.

mission.title: OUR MISSION
mission.text: At Golden Era, we do not accept mediocrity. We transform the ambitious into unstoppable individuals. If you're looking for comfort, look elsewhere. Here, we forge disciplined individuals who dominate in business, relationships, and life. The body reflects the mind, and we work to strengthen both.

vision.title: OUR VISION
vision.text: We envision a world where people develop discipline, strength, and confidence. Where every individual optimizes their body, mind, and appearance as strategic tools to dominate their environment.

discipline.title: DISCIPLINE
discipline.text: Discipline is the foundation of all transformation. It turns goals into results.

excellence.title: EXCELLENCE
excellence.text: We pursue constant improvement in every workout, every decision, and every step of the process.

transformation.title: TRANSFORMATION
transformation.text: The goal is not just to change the body, but to build a strong and resilient mindset.

leadership.title: LEADERSHIP
leadership.text: True leadership begins with self-mastery and the ability to inspire others.

power.title: ABSOLUTE POWER
power.subtitle: It's time to build the best version of yourself.

form.title: START YOUR TRANSFORMATION
form.subtitle: Claim your respect. Build your best self.
form.experience: Have you seriously worked on your physique before, or is this completely new to you?

experience_options.a: Yes, I've been consistently improving my physique
experience_options.b: I've done a little, but nothing serious
experience_options.c: This is completely new to me

form.obstacle: What do you think is your biggest obstacle when it comes to improving your physique and presence?
form.rating: How would you rate your physique from 1 to 10? (Be honest)
form.goal: Where do you want to be in 3–6 months with your physique, confidence, and presence? What would achieving that change for you?
form.timeThinking: How long have you been seriously thinking about improving your physique?
form.whyYou: Why do you believe we should work with you directly? (Avoid generic answers)
form.money: Transforming your physique requires investment. Which best describes your current situation?

money_options.d: I currently don't have the resources

form.credit: What is your approximate credit score?
form.commitment: How committed are you to transforming your physique and discipline?

success.title: Application submitted
success.subtitle: Our team will contact you shortly
